lines.speaker: Barbarian guard
lines.text: Oi, whaddya want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to come through this gate.

lines.speaker: Barbarian guard
lines.text: Barbarians only. Are you a barbarian? You don't look like one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, yep you've got me there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Looks can be deceiving, I am in fact a barbarian.

lines.speaker: Barbarian guard
lines.text: Are you, now? Free up some space so you can carry something, and we'll see how barbarian you really are.

lines.speaker: Barbarian guard
lines.text: If you're a barbarian you need to be able to drink like one. We barbarians like a good drink.

lines.speaker: Barbarian guard
lines.text: I have the perfect challenge for you... The Alfred Grimhand Barcrawl! First completed by Alfred Grimhand.

lines.speaker: Barbarian guard
lines.text: Take that card to each of the bars named on it. The bartenders will know what it means. We're kinda well known.

lines.speaker: Barbarian guard
lines.text: They'll give you their strongest drink and sign your card. When you've done all that, we'll be happy to let you in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want some money.

lines.speaker: Barbarian guard
lines.text: Do I look like a bank to you?

sections.title: Talking to the barbarian guard again

lines.speaker: Barbarian guard
lines.text: So, how's the Barcrawl coming along?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't finished it yet.

lines.speaker: Barbarian guard
lines.text: Well come back when you have, you lightweight.

lines.speaker: Barbarian guard
lines.text: So, how's the Barcrawl coming along?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not too bad. I've got my barcrawl card stored somewhere for safe-keeping.

lines.speaker: Barbarian guard
lines.text: You need to take it with you when you're going on a barcrawl.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost my barcrawl card...

lines.speaker: Barbarian guard
lines.text: What are you like? You're gonna have to start all over now.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: What can I do yer for?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm doing Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Oh no not another of you guys. These barbarian barcrawls cause too much damage to my bar.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: You're going to have to pay 50 gold for the Uncle Humphrey's Gutrot.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have 50 coins.

lines.speaker: [player name]
lines.text: Blearrgh!

sections.title: Talking to the Barman instead of Blurberry

lines.speaker: Barman
lines.text: Good day to you. What can I get you to drink?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm trying to do Alfred Grimhand's barcrawl.

lines.speaker: Barman
lines.text: Oh, another silly human come to have [his/her/their] mind melted? You should take that barcrawl card to Blurberry - he always likes to serve the Fire Toad Blast himself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Um... thanks?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm doing Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl.

lines.speaker: Blurberry
lines.text: Ah, you've come to the best stop on your list! I'll give you my famous Fire Toad Blast! It'll cost you 10 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have 10 coins right now.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Yohoho me hearty what would you like to drink?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm doing Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Haha time to be breaking out the old Supergrog. That'll be 15 coins please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry I don't have 15 coins.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: What can I get you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's on the menu?

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Dragon Bitter and Greenman's Ale, oh and some cheap beer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm doing Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: I suppose you'll be wanting some Fire Brandy. That'll cost you 12 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry I don't have 12 coins.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Would you like to buy a drink?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you serve?

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Beer!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm doing Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Fancy a bit of Heart Stopper then do you? It'll only be 8 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I don't have 8 coins.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Good morning, what would you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm doing Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Oh you're a barbarian then. Now which of these barrels contained the Liverbane Ale? That'll be 18 coins please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I don't have 18 coins.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm doing Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Ah, there seems to be a fair few doing that one these days. My supply of Olde Suspiciouse is starting to run low, it'll cost you 10 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have 10 coins right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanksh very mush...

lines.speaker: Zembo
lines.text: Hey, are you wanting to try some of my fine wines and spirits? All brewed locally on Karamja island.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm doing Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl.

lines.speaker: Zembo
lines.text: Ah, you'll be wanting some Ape Bite Liqueur then. It's got a lovely banana taste, and it'll only cost you 7 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have 7 coins right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mmmmm, dat was luverly...

lines.speaker: Tina
lines.text: Heya! What can I get you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm doing Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl.

lines.speaker: Tina
lines.text: Heehee, this'll be fun!

lines.speaker: Tina
lines.text: You'll be after our Hand of Death cocktail, then. Lots of expensive parts to the cocktail, though, so it will cost you 70 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have that much money on me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm doing Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Are you sure? You look a bit skinny for that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just give me whatever I need to drink here.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Ok one Black Skull Ale coming up, 8 coins please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have 8 coins with me.

lines.speaker: [player name]
lines.text: Hiccup!

lines.speaker: Barbarian guard
lines.text: So, how's the Barcrawl coming along?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I tink I jusht 'bout done dem all... but I losht count...

lines.speaker: Barbarian guard
lines.text: Yep that seems fine, you can come in now. I never learned to read, but you look like you've drunk plenty. Also, one more thing...

lines.speaker: Barbarian guard
lines.text: Since you drink like a barbarian, I can show you how to smash your vials when you finish them. Do you want to do that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please, I want to smash my vials.

lines.speaker: Barbarian guard
lines.text: It’s all part of drinking like a barbarian! Okay, you will now smash your vials as you drink your potions.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thank you, I'd rather keep my vials.
